Hero.subtitle: and get knowledge
Hero.description: Questions are the first step towards real understanding and learning. At the "Ebda Baswal" platform, we believe that every great idea begins with a simple question. Join us and be part of a community that shares questions and grows through answers.

Fields.title: Our Fields
Fields.subtitle: We believe that work fields are not just specializations, but a path to self-discovery and contributing to building the future.

softSkills.title: Soft Skills
softSkills.description: We aim to bridge the gap that universities leave in providing soft skills like effective communication and leadership.

management.title: Management
management.description: We pay great attention to developing management and leadership skills and team management to meet job description requirements.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Analysis
dataAnalysis.description: An essential element to help individuals make informed decisions for ensuring the best results.

technicalFields.title: Technical Fields
technicalFields.description: We focus on teaching AI skills, project analysis, and programming to prepare youth for the modern job market.

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.description: We support entrepreneurs by providing the knowledge, resources, and guidance needed to turn their ideas into reality.

Goals.title: Our Vision
Goals.subtitle: Our first goal is to empower youth to build successful and impactful career paths in their communities
Goals.missionText: Empowering students, graduates, and researchers to access reliable and clear answers to all questions in their academic and professional lives through simplified, comprehensive, and accessible content.
Goals.visionText: We aspire to be a leading platform in empowering youth and recent graduates' capabilities through providing practical and effective development and training services aimed at equipping them with the tools and knowledge needed for success.

Quote.text: "Life is moderate. It is neither all pink with butterflies and eternal spring, nor pitch black darkness all the time. There is day and night, joy and sorrow."
Quote.author: Dr. Razan Al-Harith

testimonial1.comment: I was delighted to participate in a professional platform that combines youth passion with precise delivery; the 'Start with a Question' initiative is a true role model.

testimonial2.name: Hussam Al-Nasri

testimonial3.name: Montaser Dahab
testimonial3.comment: The depth of questioning and the focus on bridging the professional gap are what make 'Start with a Question' an exceptional platform.

testimonial4.name: Heba Gaafar
testimonial4.comment: I was impressed by the organizers' awareness of the importance of true empowerment, and their focus on content quality over mere reach.

testimonial5.name: Barakat Badawi
testimonial5.comment: We need platforms like this that build knowledge bridges between generations and prepare youth for market challenges with a sharp vision.

testimonial6.name: Ali Mahjoub
testimonial6.comment: An inspiring platform that steps outside traditional training frameworks to create a genuine dialogue that touches the aspirations of the next generation.

testimonial7.name: Ibrahim Al-Haj
testimonial7.comment: The conversations at 'Start with a Question' are characterized by technical intelligence and realism, providing a high-quality addition to specialized Arabic content.

testimonial8.name: Hassan Khalid
testimonial8.comment: A pioneering initiative in shedding light on available opportunities and guiding youth towards investing their energy in the most optimal way.

testimonial9.name: Rania Abdullah
testimonial9.comment: Proud of a Sudanese platform that cares about the fine details of building a professional personality and opens doors to hope and innovation.

About.title: Who Are We?
About.description: Your first destination for career guidance and skill development.
About.mainDescription: Ebda Baswal (Start with a Question) is a youth-led platform dedicated to bridging the gap between university education and the professional world. We empower students and recent graduates with the essential skills needed to excel in today's job market.
About.additionalDescription: Through practical workshops, expert mentorship, and volunteer opportunities, we provide a collaborative learning environment. We help youth build clear career paths, expand their professional networks, and turn their creative ideas into impactful realities.
About.subtitle: Bridging the gap between education and your future career.

Services.title: Our Best Services
Services.subtitle: Strategic consulting and in-depth analysis to successfully build your professional future

service1.title: Educational Content
service1.description: Continuous sharing of written and visual content through our social media platforms to simplify knowledge for beneficiaries.

service2.title: Razan's Talk
service2.description: A podcast aimed at empowering youth, students, and recent graduates in their professional journey by exploring diverse topics.

service3.title: Training Courses
service3.description: We offer periodic virtual training courses via the Telegram platform aimed at deepening understanding of the most required skills.

service4.title: Your Professional Advisor
service4.description: The "Your Professional Advisor" program provides virtual professional consultation sessions to get guidance on career planning.

service5.title: Training & Volunteer Opportunities
service5.description: In collaboration with NGOs, we offer remote volunteer opportunities such as website development and social media management.

service6.title: Scholarship Application
service6.description: We are here to help you increase your chances of being accepted for scholarships by improving essays and CVs.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the 'Start with a Question' initiative

questions.q: What is 'Start with a Question' and who is it for?
questions.a: It is a professional initiative dedicated to bridging the gap between academic education and the job market. We target fresh graduates and young professionals, helping them plan their careers and build the skills actually demanded by employers.

questions.q: How can I benefit from the podcast, and is it free?
questions.a: Yes, all podcast episodes are 100% free and available on our website and all major streaming platforms. Our goal is to share guest experiences and success stories as an accessible source of inspiration for everyone.

questions.q: Are the consultation sessions held online or in person?
questions.a: Currently, all sessions are conducted online via virtual meeting platforms. This allows you to connect with our experts from anywhere in the world with maximum schedule flexibility.

questions.q: How can I join the initiative as a volunteer or partner?
questions.a: We always welcome ambitious minds! You can reach out to us through the 'Contact Us' page by sending your profile or partnership proposal, and our team will review it and get back to you.

questions.q: What differentiates 'Start with a Question' from traditional soft skills training?
questions.a: We don't offer generic self-help; we provide 'Realistic Career Awareness.' We focus on the actual needs of the Sudanese and regional job markets, moving beyond theory to share real experiences from experts who have walked the same path.

questions.q: Does the initiative provide accredited certificates after workshops or sessions?
questions.a: Our primary goal is 'Empowerment through Skill' rather than just issuing certificates. However, for specific specialized workshops, we do provide certificates of completion to verify your attendance and the skills you've acquired.

Founder.subtitle: A Word from the Founder
Founder.quote: This journey began with one question: How can we make the path easier for those who follow?
Founder.description: A specialist in youth empowerment and career development. Dr. Razan founded 'Start with a Question' to bridge the gap for students and graduates, providing practical solutions and expert insights for today's job market.
Founder.name: Dr. Razan Al-Harith

Story.title: Our Journey
Story.subtitle: How the dream turned into reality that touches the lives of thousands

step1.title: A Small Idea, A Big Dream
step1.description: Everything started with a simple idea born from the challenges faced by new graduates. The beginning was just individual attempts at professional guidance through social media platforms.

step2.title: A Committed Team
step2.description: A small but committed team came together, united by one goal: to bridge the gap between education and work. In this phase, the features of 'Razan's Talks' began to take shape as an organized entity.

step3.title: Integrated Initiative with Tangible Impact
step3.description: Today, the idea has transformed into a complete national initiative that includes training programs, inspiring podcasts, and specialized technical consultations serving thousands of youth.

Features.title: Why Start with a Question?
Features.subtitle: We believe that every question is the beginning of a journey towards knowledge.

feature1.title: Direct Personal Experience
feature1.description: Platform founders experienced the transition from university education to professional life, giving them a deep understanding of challenges.

feature2.title: Comprehensive and Effective Programs
feature2.description: We offer integrated training programs specifically designed to bridge the gap between education and work, based on best practices.

feature3.title: Focus on Practical Empowerment
feature3.description: We equip youth with the knowledge and skills needed for professional success through practical training and interactive digital content.

Plans.title: Professional Consultation Packages
Plans.subtitle: Choose the package that suits your current stage and start shaping your future with confidence.

plan1.title: Exploration Session
plan1.description: A quick meeting to understand your current challenges and determine how our initiative can help you in your next step.

plan2.title: Professional Roadmap
plan2.description: An in-depth consultation where we cover all details, build your CV, and prepare you to break into the job market.

plan3.title: Institutional Development
plan3.description: Customized services for universities and institutions to prepare groups of graduates for the job market with professional skills.

Rating.title: What They Say About Us
Rating.subtitle: We are proud to be part of the success journey of many creative young people.

testimonial1.name: Sarah Ahmed
testimonial1.comment: The initiative was a turning point in my professional career. The soft skills I learned helped me greatly in my first interview and, by God's grace, I was able to land the job.

testimonial2.name: Mohammed Khaled
testimonial2.comment: The podcast and consultations provided by Dr. Razan always contain the essence of experience. Truly inspiring content that puts you on the right practical path.

testimonial3.name: Layla Hassan
testimonial3.comment: What distinguishes them most is honesty and realism in presenting solutions. Not just theoretical talk, but practical steps you can apply from the next day.

testimonial4.name: Abdullah Omar
testimonial4.comment: Excellent experience, they helped me organize my thoughts and prioritize before starting my search for a job in the technical field.

Process.title: How Do We Start Your Journey?
Process.subtitle: Simple and well-thought-out steps that take you from where you are now to where you aspire to be.

step1.title: Book Your Appointment
step1.description: Choose the service that suits you and schedule the time that works for your schedule through our easy system.

step2.title: Analyze Your Needs
step2.description: We study your personal profile and professional challenges before the session to ensure you get the most out of it.

step3.title: Interactive Session
step3.description: We meet online or in person to work together on solving problems and mapping out your path forward.

step4.title: Launch and Follow-up
step4.description: Our relationship doesn't end with the session. We track your progress and provide you with the resources needed for your success.

CTA.title: Are you ready to chart your professional path with confidence?
CTA.subtitle: Whether you prefer to listen to our expertise through the podcast or get personalized professional consultation, we're here to support your journey.
